---
name: Source conflict report
about: Report a conflict between a source document and current canon
title: "[Source conflict] "
labels: ["source-conflict", "needs-scientific-review"]
---

<!--
For reporting an apparent conflict between a registered source document and
current canon wording. Do NOT edit canon to resolve the conflict. Conflicts
are resolved only through explicit human review. See review/source_conflicts.md.
-->

## Source

<!-- The source in conflict. Use the source ID from
     sources/source_registry.yaml if known. Do not paste full source text. -->

## Canon file / section

<!-- The canon file and section that appears to conflict with the source. -->

## Conflicting wording or claim

<!-- Describe the conflict: what the source says vs. what the canon says.
     Use short, compliant excerpts only. -->

## Proposed classification of conflict

<!-- e.g. terminology, definition/scope, quantitative value, methodological
     assumption, citation. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- The significance of the conflict for the canon. -->

## review/source_conflicts.md

- [ ] I believe `review/source_conflicts.md` may need a new tracker entry for
      this conflict.

<!-- A maintainer will confirm whether a tracker entry is created. The conflict
     is not resolved until reviewed and approved by a maintainer. -->
